ab: Empitu tuki ka musa ku ptasan sayang.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: prajing ta matas do, mtmay ruwan ptasan ka mtgsa,rmngaw ka mdudul, “Hiyug! Thmuku!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: Paru hnang nami rmngaw, “mtgsa, embiyax su hug.”
Matas siida o, tmgsa mnan sspug kari Truku ka mtgsa.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Truku language of numbers.

ab: Smnegul nami mtgsa smpug, muyas nami uyas sspug.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: Smluhay ku lala bi ka kari ta Truku.
en: I have learned many Truku languages.

ab: Musa ku matas kdjiyax, smluhay ku kari ta Truku kdjiyax, rrngaw mu ni pqbhangun mu bubu.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Truku language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
